modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Fusion startup failure on Windows 11 with network card issue.

full_description_text: 
This morning, I tried to start Fusion on my Windows 11 computer. I received a message saying there was a startup failure. The error mentioned something about my computer not being identified. It also said there might be a problem with the network card or something called WMI. I have never seen this error before.
short_description: Fusion startup failure on Windows 11 with network card issue.
description: This morning, I tried to start Fusion on my Windows 11 computer. I received a message saying there was a startup failure. The error mentioned something about my computer not being identified. It also said there might be a problem with the network card or something called WMI. I have never seen this error before.
